---
title: "Kader Mohideen"
description: "Cybersecurity solution architect, bridging security and AI/ML."
page-layout: full
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/avatar.png
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kader-xai/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/kader-xai
    - text: "{{< fa brands youtube >}} YouTube"
      href: https://www.youtube.com/@kader_mohideen
    - text: "{{< fa brands hugging-face >}} Hugging Face"
      href: https://huggingface.co/kader-xai
    - text: "{{< fa brands kaggle >}} Kaggle"
      href: https://www.kaggle.com/kadermohideen9
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:pentest101@protonmail.com
    - text: "{{< fa solid file-lines >}} CV"
      href: cv.qmd
    - icon: rss
      text: RSS
      href: blog.xml
---

```{=html}
<style>
.courses-hero{ margin:.2rem 0 2.4rem; }
.courses-hero h2{ margin:0 0 .15rem; font-size:1.95rem; letter-spacing:-.01em; }
.courses-hero .ch-sub{ color:var(--ink-soft,#5a5a72); margin:.1rem 0 1.2rem; font-size:1.03rem; }
.course-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(232px,1fr)); gap:.85rem; }
.course-card{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:.55rem; text-decoration:none !important;
  background:var(--glass-panel,rgba(255,255,255,.62)); border:1px solid var(--glass-border,rgba(0,0,0,.10));
  border-radius:15px; padding:1.05rem 1.05rem 1.15rem 1.2rem; position:relative; overflow:hidden;
  transition:transform .16s ease, box-shadow .16s ease, border-color .16s ease; }
.course-card::before{ content:""; position:absolute; left:0; top:0; bottom:0; width:4px; background:linear-gradient(#ff6a5e,#d50000); }
.course-card:hover{ transform:translateY(-5px); box-shadow:0 16px 34px rgba(0,0,0,.24); border-color:var(--gold,#caa14a); }
.course-play{ display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; width:34px; height:34px; border-radius:50%;
  background:#ff0000; color:#fff; font-size:.78rem; padding-left:2px; box-shadow:0 5px 14px rgba(255,0,0,.42); }
.course-title{ font-weight:700; color:var(--ink,#1a1a1a); line-height:1.28; font-size:1.04rem; }
.course-meta{ font-size:.74rem; color:var(--ink-faint,#8a8a8a); font-weight:700; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.04em; }
.course-card:hover .course-meta{ color:var(--gold,#caa14a); }
</style>
<div class="courses-hero">
  <h2>🎓 Video Courses</h2>
  <p class="ch-sub">Free, hands-on playlists on AI, ML, data science &amp; security — all on <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@kader_mohideen" target="_blank" rel="noopener">YouTube</a>. ▶ Pick one and start learning.</p>
  <div class="course-grid">
    <a class="course-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLIACnFYpjTsk" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span class="course-play">▶</span><span class="course-title">🧮 Mathematics for Machine Learning</span><span class="course-meta">Watch playlist ↗</span></a>
    <a class="course-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLLnVx3dSL9Vw" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span class="course-play">▶</span><span class="course-title">🐍 Data Science with Python</span><span class="course-meta">Watch playlist ↗</span></a>
    <a class="course-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLU3Am-JGG39I" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span class="course-play">▶</span><span class="course-title">🧹 Data Cleaning &amp; Feature Engineering</span><span class="course-meta">Watch playlist ↗</span></a>
    <a class="course-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLR7YtqHQLLYE" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span class="course-play">▶</span><span class="course-title">⚙️ Neural Network Optimization</span><span class="course-meta">Watch playlist ↗</span></a>
    <a class="course-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZ27d3oGcWmE" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span class="course-play">▶</span><span class="course-title">📊 TensorFlow from Scratch</span><span class="course-meta">Watch playlist ↗</span></a>
    <a class="course-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLXgmP3hzUPQA" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span class="course-play">▶</span><span class="course-title">🤗 Hugging Face Transformers</span><span class="course-meta">Watch playlist ↗</span></a>
    <a class="course-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLFIEd5iwi4C8" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span class="course-play">▶</span><span class="course-title">🛡️ XGBoost for CyberDefense</span><span class="course-meta">Watch playlist ↗</span></a>
    <a class="course-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLdYdbdTcrIQQ" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span class="course-play">▶</span><span class="course-title">🔗 AI Engineering &amp; Graph RAG</span><span class="course-meta">Watch playlist ↗</span></a>
    <a class="course-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLQFrSnwp58Js" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span class="course-play">▶</span><span class="course-title">🕸️ AI Agents with LangGraph</span><span class="course-meta">Watch playlist ↗</span></a>
    <a class="course-card" href="https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLK37H4rWLeeY" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span class="course-play">▶</span><span class="course-title">🤖 Agent Harness Engineering</span><span class="course-meta">Watch playlist ↗</span></a>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Welcome 👋

I'm **Kader Mohideen**, a CISSP-certified cybersecurity solution architect based in **Riyadh, Saudi Arabia**, with 9+ years across the GCC/MENA enterprise market. My work sits at the intersection of deep security engineering and commercial presales — designing zero trust, DDI, and cloud security deployments for enterprise customers.

These days I'm bridging that foundation with **AI/ML and data science**. This site is where I share research notes, project write-ups, and ideas at the boundary of AI and security.

#### Areas of Focus

1. **AI in cybersecurity** — applying ML to detection, analytics, and security automation.
2. **Solution architecture** — multi-vendor stacks across DDI, zero trust, network and cloud security.
3. **Attack-Centric Framework (ACF)** — a recurring topic on the [blog](blog.qmd).
4. **Compliance & frameworks** — NIST, NCA, ISO/IEC 27001, GDPR.

Recent work: see the [blog](blog.qmd) and [projects](projects.qmd). For background and credentials, head to the [about page](about.qmd).

::: {.panel}
### {{< fa brands youtube >}} Machine Learning — Web Series

A video series walking through machine learning, hosted on YouTube. New episodes added over time.

[▶ Watch the playlist](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLh0QMEOMMpQA37o-slZxpCOh_FguMnEcv){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}
:::
